LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT - <NO APPEARANCE - TENTATIVE ADOPTED - 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION, HARASSMENT, RETAILIATION - FEHA: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING CONDUCT BY JONES OUTSIDE THAT NECESSARY FOR JOB PERFORMANCE. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF CA FAMILY RIGHTS ACT [CFRA]: SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE JONES IS NOT PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYER. SEE GOVERNMENT CODE 19245.2(C)(2). 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION: SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. FAILURE TO ACCOMMODATE IS BARRED BY RENO V BAIRD (1998) 18 CAL.APP.4TH 640. ACCOMMODATION IS PART OF PERSONNEL DUTIES. IF CLAIM IS RETALIATION IT IS DUPLICATIVE. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IIED: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE CONDUCT OUTSIDE OF THAT NECESSARY TO CARRY OUT MANAGERIAL AND PERSONNEL DUTIES.
